components.name: PgdButton
components.description: Primary action button with variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger.

components.name: PgdInput
components.description: Text input field with label, placeholder, validation states.

components.name: PgdBadge
components.description: Small status indicator badge with color variants.

components.name: PgdAvatar
components.description: User avatar with image fallback to initials.

components.name: PgdCheckbox
components.description: Custom styled checkbox with indeterminate state.

components.name: PgdSearchField
components.description: Search input with debounced suggestions dropdown.

components.name: PgdCard
components.description: Content card with optional header, body, footer.

components.name: PgdAlert
components.description: Alert banner with success, error, warning, info variants.

components.name: PgdModal
components.description: Dialog modal with backdrop, header, body, footer slots.

components.name: PgdDataTable
components.description: Feature-rich data table with sort, filter, pagination.

components.name: PgdSidebar
components.description: Collapsible side navigation with nested items and badges.

components.name: TplDashboardLayout
components.description: Standard dashboard layout: sidebar + topbar + content.

components.name: PgPageLogin
components.description: Login page with email/phone + password, SSO options.

requests.title: Add tertiary button variant
requests.component_description: Tertiary button for low emphasis actions inside dashboard and forms.
requests.use_case: Used for optional secondary actions where primary and secondary buttons already exist.

requests.title: New date range picker component
requests.component_description: Calendar-based date range selector supporting single, range, and multi-select modes.
requests.use_case: Used in financial reports, transaction filters, and booking flows.

requests.title: Improve notification badge accessibility
requests.component_description: Add ARIA labels and role attributes to badge for screen reader support.
requests.use_case: Required for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all products.

requests.title: Redesign PgdSidebar for collapsible mini mode
requests.component_description: Add collapsible mini mode showing only icons. Include smooth transitions.
requests.use_case: Better space usage on smaller screens and for power users.

requests.title: Fix button focus ring on Safari
requests.component_description: Focus ring not rendering correctly on Safari 16+.
requests.use_case: Accessibility issue for keyboard navigation users.

requests.title: Add PgdToast notification component
requests.component_description: Auto-dismiss toast notification with action button support.
requests.use_case: System feedback for async operations: save, delete, errors.

requests.title: Update PgdInput documentation
requests.component_description: Add missing props documentation and usage examples for Storybook.

requests.title: Audit PgdModal token usage
requests.component_description: Check all color and spacing tokens are aligned with DS v3 token system.

requests.title: PgdDataTable need revision
requests.component_description: Table sort interaction needs rework. Loading state animation too slow.

requests.title: PgdCard design review
requests.component_description: Card hover elevation and shadow tokens.
requests.use_case: Used in dashboard and listing pages.

request_logs.note: Submitted request for tertiary button variant.
Proposed new DateRangePicker component. Awaiting validation.
Started design for badge accessibility improvements.
Started fixing Safari focus ring bug.
